title: Nursery Rhyme. DCXIII. Relics.
content:
Baby and I
            Were baked in a pie,
        The gravy was wonderful hot:
            We had nothing to pay
            To the baker that day,
        And so we crept out of the pot.
meaning:
"Nursery Rhyme. DCXIII. Relics." is a quintessential example of Unknown's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
